sections.paragraph:
f.-

(1) Inf. fem. gen. of the verb אָהַב. With Lamed pref. Isa 56:6, לְאַהֲבָה אֶת־שֵּׁם יְהֹוָה “to love the name of Jehovah,” Deu 10:15 11:13 , 22 Deu 11:22 Jos 22:5 23:11 with בְּ 1Ki 10:9, בְּאַהֲבַת יְהֹוָה אֶת־ יִשְׂרָאֵל “for the love of Jehovah towards Israel.” In the same sense with the prefix בְּ Hos 3:1 and מִן Deu 7:8, מֵאַהֲבַת יְהֹוָה אֶתְכֶם “because that Jehovah loveth you.”

(2) love, specially as between the sexes, Son 2:4 5:8 8:6 , of God towards men, Hos 3:1 of friends towards one another, 1Sa 18:3.

(3) love, delight, concr. of a beloved female, Son 2:7 3:5 and so perhaps also verse 10 [“where others take it as an adv. lovely”].
